polygon.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; paint-order: stroke; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 56.4371px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 92px; font-weight: 700; stroke-width: 0px; white-space: pre;

polyline.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 50px; fill: rgb(219, 24, 24); stroke: rgb(204, 40, 40);

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 92px; font-weight: 700; stroke-width: 0px; white-space: pre;
